name: Creative Header
html:
{{logo}}
    {{#each navLinks}}
  • {{label}}
    • {{/each}}
css: .header { padding: 1.5rem 0; background: transparent; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100; } .container { max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .header-inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .logo a { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; color: #fff; text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .nav-links { display: flex; list-style: none; gap: 2.5rem; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .nav-links a { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.95rem; transition: color 0.2s; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .nav-links a:hover { color: #ec4899; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .nav { display: none; } }

name: Creative Hero
html:
{{title}}

{{subtitle}}

{{ctaPrimary}}{{ctaSecondary}}
css: .hero { padding: 10rem 0 6rem; background: #0f0f0f; color: #fff; } .hero-content { max-width: 900px; } .hero-title { font-size: 5rem; font-weight: 900; line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; letter-spacing: -0.03em; } .hero-title span { color: #ec4899; } .hero-subtitle { font-size: 1.25rem; color: #a0a0a0; margin-bottom: 2.5rem; line-height: 1.6; max-width: 600px; } .hero-actions { display: flex; gap: 1rem; } .btn { padding: 1rem 2rem; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 0; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; display: inline-block; } .btn-primary { background: #ec4899; color: #fff; border: none; } .btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #fff; border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3); } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .hero-title { font-size: 3.5rem; } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .hero { padding: 8rem 0 4rem; } .hero-title { font-size: 2.5rem; } } @media (max-width: 320px) { .hero-title { font-size: 1.75rem; } .hero-actions { flex-direction: column; } }

subtitle.default: A multidisciplinary design studio crafting bold brands, immersive websites, and unforgettable digital products.

name: Portfolio Gallery
html:
{{title}}

{{description}}

{{#each projects}}
{{title}}

{{title}}

{{category}}
{{/each}}
css: .gallery { padding: 5rem 0; background: #0f0f0f; } .section-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 3rem; } .section-title { font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 800; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 1rem; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .section-desc { font-size: 1.125rem; color: #a0a0a0; } .gallery-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem; } .gallery-item { display: block; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; transition: transform 0.3s; } .gallery-item:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); } .gallery-image { aspect-ratio: 4/3; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .gallery-placeholder { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); } .gallery-info { padding: 1rem 0; } .gallery-title { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; margin: 0 0 0.25rem; } .gallery-category { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #ec4899; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .gallery-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .gallery-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .section-title { font-size: 2rem; } }

description.default: A curated collection of our best projects

name: Creative Services
html:
{{title}}

{{#each services}}
{{number}}

{{title}}

{{description}}

{{/each}}
css: .services { padding: 5rem 0; background: #1a1a1a; } .section-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 3rem; } .section-title { font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 800; color: #fff; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .services-list { max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; } .service-item { display: flex; gap: 2rem; padding: 2rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); align-items: flex-start; } .service-number { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; color: #ec4899; min-width: 40px; } .service-title { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .service-desc { color: #a0a0a0; line-height: 1.6; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .service-item { flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; } .section-title { font-size: 2rem; } }

default.title: Brand Identity
default.description: Logos, visual systems, and brand guidelines that make a lasting impression.

default.title: Web Design & Development
default.description: Custom websites that combine stunning design with flawless functionality.

default.title: UI/UX Design
default.description: Intuitive interfaces and seamless user experiences for digital products.

default.title: Motion & Animation
default.description: Captivating animations and video content that bring your brand to life.

name: Creative Testimonials
html:
{{title}}

{{#each testimonials}}
"{{text}}"
{{name}}{{role}}
{{/each}}
css: .testimonials { padding: 5rem 0; background: #0f0f0f; } .section-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 3rem; } .section-title { font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 800; color: #fff; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .testimonials-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 2rem; } .testimonial-card { background: #1a1a1a; padding: 2.5rem; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); } .testimonial-text { font-size: 1.125rem; color: #fff; line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; font-style: italic; } .author-name { color: #ec4899; display: block; } .author-role { color: #a0a0a0; font-size: 0.875rem; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .testimonials-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .section-title { font-size: 2rem; } }

default.text: Studio completely reinvented our brand. The result was beyond anything we imagined — bold, modern, and authentically us.
default.name: Alex Rivera

default.text: Their design sensibility is unmatched. Every pixel was intentional, every interaction delightful. Truly world-class work.
default.name: Maya Chen

name: Creative CTA
html:
{{title}}

{{description}}

{{buttonText}}
css: .cta { padding: 6rem 0; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7c3aed 0%, #ec4899 100%); color: #fff; } .cta-content { text-align: center; max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto; } .cta-title { font-size: 3.5rem; font-weight: 900; margin-bottom: 1rem; letter-spacing: -0.03em; } .cta-desc { font-size: 1.25rem; opacity: 0.9; margin-bottom: 2rem; } .btn { padding: 1rem 2rem; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 0; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; display: inline-block; } .btn-primary { background: #fff; color: #7c3aed; border: none; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .cta { padding: 4rem 0; } .cta-title { font-size: 2.5rem; } } @media (max-width: 320px) { .cta-title { font-size: 1.75rem; } }

description.default: Have a project in mind? We'd love to hear about it.

name: Creative Contact Form
description: Minimal contact form for project inquiries
html:
{{title}}

{{#each fields}}
{{#if type='textarea'}}{{else}}{{/if}}
{{/each}}
css: .contact-form { padding: 5rem 0; background: #1a1a1a; } .form-wrapper { max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; } .form-title { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 800; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 2rem; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .form-group { margin-bottom: 1.5rem; } .form-label { display: block; font-weight: 500; color: #a0a0a0; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 0.875rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .form-input { width: 100%; padding: 1rem; background: transparent; border: none; border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); color: #fff; font-size: 1rem; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .form-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #ec4899; } textarea.form-input { min-height: 120px; resize: vertical; } .btn-block { width: 100%; text-align: center; border: none; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 0; } .btn-primary { background: #ec4899; color: #fff; padding: 1rem 2rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; font-size: 1rem; text-decoration: none; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .form-title { font-size: 2rem; } }

default.label: Tell us about your project
default.placeholder: What are you looking to create?

name: Creative Footer
html:
{{logo}}

{{description}}

    {{#each links}}
  • {{label}}
    • {{/each}}

{{copyright}}
css: .footer { padding: 4rem 0 2rem; background: #0f0f0f; color: #a0a0a0; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); } .footer-inner { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 3rem; } .footer-logo { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 1rem; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .footer-desc { max-width: 300px; line-height: 1.6; } .footer-nav { display: flex; list-style: none; gap: 2rem; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .footer-nav a { color: #a0a0a0; text-decoration: none; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 0.875rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; transition: color 0.2s; } .footer-nav a:hover { color: #ec4899; } .footer-bottom { border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding-top: 2rem; text-align: center; } .copyright { font-size: 0.875rem; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .footer-inner { flex-direction: column; gap: 2rem; } .footer-nav { flex-wrap: wrap; } }

description.default: A multidisciplinary design studio creating bold digital experiences.
